title: Generated Component Index
description: GENERATED, never hand-edited. Built by `ds:registry` from the colocated <Component>.spec.json files (see component-spec.schema.json) plus filesystem facts. This is the queryable/diffable aggregate the AI and CI consume; the source of truth is the colocated specs.

tokensRef.description: Path to design-tokens.json the component tokens validate against.

items.description: A colocated spec, merged with filesystem-resolved paths. Spec fields (name, tier, status, figma, props, tokens, dependencies, notes) are copied verbatim from <Component>.spec.json — see component-spec.schema.json.

specMissing.description: True when a component .svelte exists on disk with no colocated .spec.json yet. Drives the 'todo' rows in the checklist.
